creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, Alexandre!
You are fast! :-D
I'm already got Minecraft Client 1.21 (didn't run it yet) and planned to create patch, but you are faster. :-o
Hopefully I'll have time to test this version this weekend.

But where is maintainer? It isn't good tendency to wait 2 week "maintainer timeout" every time…
